trans-unit.source: TRX report generation and merge tools require a test application builder that supports artifact post-processing
trans-unit.target: TRX report generation and merge tools require a test application builder that supports artifact post-processing
trans-unit.note: Do not localize format name {Locked="TRX"}.

trans-unit.source: Merges TRX reports produced by Microsoft.Testing.Extensions.TrxReport
trans-unit.target: Merges TRX reports produced by Microsoft.Testing.Extensions.TrxReport
trans-unit.note: Do not localize format name {Locked="TRX"} or assembly name {Locked="Microsoft.Testing.Extensions.TrxReport"}.

trans-unit.source: TRX report merger
trans-unit.target: TRX report merger
trans-unit.note: Do not localize format name {Locked="TRX"}.

trans-unit.source: The baseline TRX file
trans-unit.target: Fichier TRX de référence
trans-unit.note: Do not localize option name {Locked="--baseline-trx"} or format name {Locked="TRX"}.

trans-unit.source: '--{0}' and '--{1}' must both be specified
trans-unit.target: '--{0}' et '--{1}' doivent tous deux être spécifiés
trans-unit.note: 0 is the first option name without the leading {Locked="--"}. 1 is the second option name without the leading {Locked="--"}.

trans-unit.source: This tool allows to compare and highlights differences between 2 TRX reports
trans-unit.target: Cet outil permet de comparer et met en surbrillance les différences entre 2 rapports TRX
trans-unit.note: Do not localize format name {Locked="TRX"}.

trans-unit.source: TRX comparer tool
trans-unit.target: Outil comparateur TRX
trans-unit.note: Do not localize format name {Locked="TRX"}.

trans-unit.source: '--{0}' expects a single trx file path as argument
trans-unit.target: '--{0}' attend un seul chemin de fichier trx comme argument
trans-unit.note: 0 is the option name without the leading {Locked="--"}. Do not localize file extension {Locked=".trx"}.

trans-unit.source: The TRX file to compare with the baseline
trans-unit.target: Fichier TRX à comparer à la ligne de base
trans-unit.note: Do not localize option name {Locked="--trx-to-compare"} or format name {Locked="TRX"}.

trans-unit.source: Warning: Trx file '{0}' already exists and will be overwritten.
trans-unit.target: Avertissement : le fichier Trx '{0}' existe déjà et sera remplacé.
trans-unit.note: {0} is the {Locked="TRX"} report file path.

trans-unit.source: Merges multiple TRX files into one from the command line
trans-unit.target: Merges multiple TRX files into one from the command line
trans-unit.note: Do not localize format name {Locked="TRX"}.

trans-unit.source: TRX report merge tool
trans-unit.target: TRX report merge tool
trans-unit.note: Do not localize format name {Locked="TRX"}.

trans-unit.source: Two or more input TRX file paths
trans-unit.target: Two or more input TRX file paths
trans-unit.note: Do not localize option name {Locked="--input"} or format name {Locked="TRX"}.

trans-unit.source: '--input' expects two or more existing TRX file paths
trans-unit.target: '--input' expects two or more existing TRX file paths
trans-unit.note: Do not localize option name {Locked="--input"} or format name {Locked="TRX"}.

trans-unit.source: '--output-trx' expects one TRX file path
trans-unit.target: '--output-trx' expects one TRX file path
trans-unit.note: Do not localize option name {Locked="--output-trx"} or format name {Locked="TRX"}.

trans-unit.source: The output TRX file path
trans-unit.target: The output TRX file path
trans-unit.note: Do not localize option name {Locked="--output-trx"} or format name {Locked="TRX"}.

trans-unit.source: {0} TRX files merged
trans-unit.target: {0} TRX files merged
trans-unit.note: {0} is the number of merged files. Do not localize format name {Locked="TRX"}.

trans-unit.source: TRX report (merged)
trans-unit.target: TRX report (merged)
trans-unit.note: Do not localize format name {Locked="TRX"}.

trans-unit.source: Merged TRX report
trans-unit.target: Merged TRX report
trans-unit.note: Do not localize format name {Locked="TRX"}.

trans-unit.source: Test session
trans-unit.target: Session de test

trans-unit.source: TRX Report
trans-unit.target: Rapport TRX
trans-unit.note: Do not localize format name {Locked="TRX"}.

trans-unit.source: '--report-trx-filename' file name argument must end with '.trx' (e.g. --report-trx-filename myreport.trx)
trans-unit.target: L'argument du nom de fichier '--report-trx-filename' doit se terminer par '.trx' (par exemple --report-trx-filename myreport.trx)
trans-unit.note: Do not localize option name {Locked="--report-trx-filename"}, file extension {Locked=".trx"}, or example command {Locked="--report-trx-filename myreport.trx"}.

trans-unit.source: '--report-trx-filename' file name part must not be empty (e.g. --report-trx-filename myreport.trx)
trans-unit.target: La partie nom de fichier de « --report-trx-filename » ne doit pas être vide (par exemple, --report-trx-filename myreport.trx)
trans-unit.note: Do not localize option name {Locked="--report-trx-filename"}, file extension {Locked=".trx"}, or example command {Locked="--report-trx-filename myreport.trx"}.

trans-unit.source: The name of the generated TRX report. May include a relative or absolute path; relative paths are resolved against the test results directory and missing directories are created. Supports the following placeholders: {pname} (test application name), {pid} (process ID), {asm} (entry assembly name), {tfm} (target framework moniker), {arch} (process architecture), {time} (timestamp). Example: MyReport_{tfm}.trx
trans-unit.target: Nom du rapport TRX généré. Peut inclure un chemin d’accès relatif ou absolu. Les chemins relatifs sont résolus sur le répertoire des résultats des tests et les répertoires manquants sont créés. Permet de prendre en charge les espaces réservés suivants : {pname} (nom de l’application de test), {pid} (ID de processus), {asm} (nom de l’assembly d’entrée), {tfm} (moniker de framework cible), {arch} (architecture du processus), {time} (horodateur). Exemple : MyReport_{tfm}.trx
trans-unit.note: Do not localize option name {Locked="--report-trx-filename"}, format name {Locked="TRX"}, placeholder tokens {Locked="{pname}"}{Locked="{pid}"}{Locked="{asm}"}{Locked="{tfm}"}{Locked="{arch}"}{Locked="{time}"}, file extension {Locked=".trx"}, or example file name {Locked="MyReport_{tfm}.trx"}.

trans-unit.source: '--report-trx-filename' relative paths must stay under the test results directory (e.g. --report-trx-filename nested/myreport.trx)
trans-unit.target: Les chemins relatifs pour « --report-trx-filename » doivent rester dans le répertoire des résultats de test (par exemple, --report-trx-filename nested/myreport.trx)
trans-unit.note: Do not localize option name {Locked="--report-trx-filename"}, file extension {Locked=".trx"}, or example path {Locked="nested/myreport.trx"}.

trans-unit.source: '--report-trx-filename' requires '--report-trx' to be enabled
trans-unit.target: '--report-trx-filename' nécessite que '--report-trx' soit activé
trans-unit.note: Do not localize option names {Locked="--report-trx-filename"}{Locked="--report-trx"}.

trans-unit.source: file name argument must not contain path (e.g. --report-trx-filename myreport.trx)
trans-unit.target: L'argument du nom de fichier ne doit pas contenir de chemin (par exemple --report-trx-filename myreport.trx)
trans-unit.note: Do not localize option name {Locked="--report-trx-filename"}, file extension {Locked=".trx"}, or example command {Locked="--report-trx-filename myreport.trx"}.

trans-unit.source: The test framework '{0}' with UID '{1}' does not support the 'ITrxReportCapability' leading to missing or incomplete TRX reports
trans-unit.target: Le framework de test '{0}' avec l'UID '{1}' ne prend pas en charge 'ITrxReportCapability', ce qui entraîne des rapports TRX manquants ou incomplets
trans-unit.note: 0 is the test framework display name. 1 is the test framework {Locked="UID"}. Do not localize {Locked="ITrxReportCapability"} or format name {Locked="TRX"}.

trans-unit.source: Method 'BeforeTestHostProcessStartAsync' must be called before 'OnTestHostProcessStartedAsync'
trans-unit.target: La méthode 'BeforeTestHostProcessStartAsync' doit être appelée avant 'OnTestHostProcessStartedAsync'
trans-unit.note: Do not localize method names {Locked="BeforeTestHostProcessStartAsync"}{Locked="OnTestHostProcessStartedAsync"}.

trans-unit.source: Produce a TRX report for the current test session
trans-unit.target: Produire un rapport TRX pour la session de test actuelle
trans-unit.note: Do not localize format name {Locked="TRX"}.

trans-unit.source: TRX report generator
trans-unit.target: Générateur de rapports TRX
trans-unit.note: Do not localize format name {Locked="TRX"}.

trans-unit.source: Required environment variable '{0}' is missing for TRX report generator
trans-unit.target: La variable d’environnement requise «{0}» est manquante pour le générateur de rapports TRX
trans-unit.note: {0} is the environment variable name.

trans-unit.source: '--report-trx' cannot be enabled when using '--list-tests'
trans-unit.target: '--report-trx' ne peut pas être activé lors de l'utilisation de '--list-tests'
trans-unit.note: Do not localize option names {Locked="--report-trx"}{Locked="--list-tests"}.

trans-unit.source: Enable generating TRX report
trans-unit.target: Activer la génération du rapport TRX
trans-unit.note: Do not localize option name {Locked="--report-trx"} or format name {Locked="TRX"}.

trans-unit.source: Requests of type '{0}' is not supported
trans-unit.target: Les demandes de type «{0}» ne sont pas prises en charge
trans-unit.note: {0} is the unsupported request type name.
